2026-04-16T18:48:57.9390550Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9391300Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9391726Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9392087Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9392401Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9392645Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9392804Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9392987Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9393158Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9393395Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9393602Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9393893Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T18:48:57.9394151Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). 2026-04-16T18:52:46.6647646Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6647770Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6648336Z **Service directory:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6648707Z **Triggered by:** PR #58230 by @scbedd
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6648883Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6648958Z ## What Changed
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6649074Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6649351Z The package was upgraded to api-version `2025-05-01-preview`, introducing five new resource types:
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6649719Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6649893Z - `AdvisorAssessmentResource` / `AdvisorAssessmentCollection`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650123Z - `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` / `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650258Z - `AdvisorTriageResource` / `AdvisorTriageCollection`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650510Z - `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` / `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650681Z - `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` / `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650686Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650765Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6650768Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6651385Z - The README `Examples` section contains only a generic link (`https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples`); there are no inline code snippets demonstrating any of the package's resource types
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6651941Z - No sample test files exist for the five new resource types (`AdvisorAssessment`, `AdvisorResiliencyReview`, `AdvisorTriage`, `AdvisorTriageRecommendation`, `AdvisorScoreEntity`)
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6652393Z - The CHANGELOG entry for `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` only says "Upgraded api-version to 2025-05-01-preview" without listing the new resource types by name
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6652401Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6652475Z <details>
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6652687Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6652692Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653011Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653015Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653097Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653107Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653375Z **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/CHANGELOG.md` — **edit**
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653379Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653720Z Replace the sparse `### Features Added` block under `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` with an itemized list of new resource types:
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653725Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653799Z ```markdown
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653875Z ### Features Added
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6653879Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6654130Z - Upgraded api-version to `2025-05-01-preview`.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6654438Z - Added `AdvisorAssessmentResource` and `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` for managing Advisor assessments.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6654794Z - Added `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` and `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection` for managing resiliency reviews.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6655046Z - Added `AdvisorTriageResource` and `AdvisorTriageCollection` for managing triage sessions.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6655462Z - Added `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` and `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection` for managing triage recommendations.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6655881Z - Added `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` and `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection` for querying Advisor scores.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6655959Z ```
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6655963Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6656057Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6656061Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6656689Z Create the following sample test files. Use the existing files in `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/` (e.g. `Sample_SuppressionContractCollection.cs`) as style references.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6656699Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657139Z **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorAssessmentCollection.cs` — **create**
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657144Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657235Z Provide a `[Test]` method that:
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657378Z 1. Creates an `ArmClient` using `DefaultAzureCredential`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657707Z 2. Gets the default subscription via `client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6657959Z 3. Retrieves `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` via `subscription.GetAdvisorAssessments()`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658271Z 4. Lists all assessments with `await foreach (AdvisorAssessmentResource item in collection.GetAllAsync())`
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658275Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658485Z Wrap the core snippet in `#region Snippet:AdvisorGetAssessments` / `#endregion`.
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658489Z 
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658968Z **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection.cs` — **create**
2026-04-16T18:52:46.6658973Z
